headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors reports strong demand in Central Europe, raises outlook

sentiment.reasoning: The company is experiencing positive demand momentum and has officially increased its financial guidance for the period.

headlines.headline: Plevep Power reports 8% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% decline in operating income directly impacts profitability and typically triggers a negative market reaction.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
